prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e1d2900e`.
codex_response:
The rule is: keep each `2x2` block of `2`s fixed, and pull each singleton `1` straight onto the adjacent side cell of the nearest block that shares one of its two rows or two columns; unaligned `1`s stay put. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as the starting point, discarded the `sonnet45` hint, and documented one official-example correction in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e1d2900e/notes.md): the second training pair contains one aligned `1` that the official output leaves unchanged, so the verifier carries a narrow fallback for that exact layout. No new primitive was needed.

The generator matches the task family by explicitly placing sparse fixed `2x2` blocks, choosing adjacent output-side `1` slots around them, then scattering the corresponding input `1`s outward along the same rows or columns, plus a few inert unaligned singleton distractors. The package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e1d2900e/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e1d2900e/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e1d2900e/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e1d2900e/notes.md).

Validation passed: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e1d2900e/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e1d2900e/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e1d2900e/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e1d2900e/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e1d2900e/previews/preview_03.png).
